queries.question: Provide me with the names and types of spaces available at all convention centers.
queries.sql: SELECT Event_Spaces.space_name, Event_Spaces.type  from Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces join Event_Spaces on Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.event_space_id = Event_Spaces.id join Convention_Centers on Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.convention_center_id = Convention_Centers.id   GROUP BY Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.event_space_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.convention_center_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Convention_Centers)

queries.question: Provide me with the names and types of spaces available at all convention centers.
queries.sql: select convention_centers.name , event_spaces.space_name , event_spaces.type from Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces join Event_Spaces on Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.event_space_id = Event_Spaces.id join Convention_Centers on Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.convention_center_id = Convention_Centers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?space_name ?type WHERE {
  ?convention_centers_event_spaces a :Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces .
  ?event_spaces a :EventSpaces .
  ?convention_centers_event_spaces p:hasEvent_Spaces ?event_spaces .
  ?convention_centers a :Convention_Centers .
  ?convention_centers_event_spaces p:hasConvention_Centers ?convention_centers .
  ?convention_centers p:name ?name .
  ?event_spaces p:space_name ?space_name .
  ?event_spaces p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: List the names of all spaces for each convention center.
queries.sql: select convention_centers.name , event_spaces.space_name from Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces join Event_Spaces on Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.event_space_id = Event_Spaces.id join Convention_Centers on Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.convention_center_id = Convention_Centers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?space_name WHERE {
  ?convention_centers_event_spaces a :Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces .
  ?event_spaces a :EventSpaces .
  ?convention_centers_event_spaces p:hasEvent_Spaces ?event_spaces .
  ?convention_centers a :Convention_Centers .
  ?convention_centers_event_spaces p:hasConvention_Centers ?convention_centers .
  ?convention_centers p:name ?name .
  ?event_spaces p:space_name ?space_name .
}

queries.question: Display the name of the spaces at each convention center.
queries.sql: SELECT Event_Spaces.space_name  from Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces join Event_Spaces on Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.event_space_id = Event_Spaces.id join Convention_Centers on Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.convention_center_id = Convention_Centers.id   GROUP BY Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.event_space_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.convention_center_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Convention_Centers)

queries.question: What type of event spaces are available for each convention center?
queries.sql: SELECT Event_Spaces.type  from Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces join Event_Spaces on Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.event_space_id = Event_Spaces.id join Convention_Centers on Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.convention_center_id = Convention_Centers.id   GROUP BY Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.event_space_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Convention_Centers_Event_Spaces.convention_center_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Convention_Centers)
